Class CalendarModel

java.lang.Object
Model.AbstractModel
Model.CalendarModel
public class CalendarModel extends AbstractModel
Holds all of the state the application needs: the event list, the currently displayed date, the active view mode and the dark-mode flag. Two events cannot share the same title.

It extends AbstractModel, so every relevant change fires a PropertyChangeEvent that the view layer listens to (Observer pattern).

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class AbstractModel

    propertyChangeSupport

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    CalendarModel()
    Creates an empty model positioned at today's date, in month/light mode.

  • Constructor Details

    • CalendarModel

      public CalendarModel()
      Creates an empty model positioned at today's date, in month/light mode.

  • Method Details

    • addEvent

      public boolean addEvent(Event e)
      Adds a new event unless another event already has the same title.
      Parameters:
      e - the event to add
      Returns:
      true if it was added, false if the title was taken

    • removeEvent

      public void removeEvent(Event e)
      Removes an event from the list.
      Parameters:
      e - the event to remove

    • getEventByTitle

      public Event getEventByTitle(String title)
      Looks up an event by its title (case-insensitive).
      Parameters:
      title - the title to search for
      Returns:
      the matching event, or null if none exists

    • getEventsOn

      public List<Event> getEventsOn(LocalDate day)
      Returns every event that happens on the given day (recurrences included), sorted chronologically.
      Parameters:
      day - the day to query
      Returns:
      the events of that day in time order

    • hasEventsOn

      public boolean hasEventsOn(LocalDate day)
      Tells whether any event occurs on the given day.
      Parameters:
      day - the day to query
      Returns:
      true if at least one event occurs that day

    • countEventsOn

      public int countEventsOn(LocalDate day)
      Counts how many events occur on the given day (recurrences included).
      Parameters:
      day - the day to query
      Returns:
      the number of events on that day

    • searchEvents

      public List<Event> searchEvents(String keyword)
      Searches every event for a keyword in its title, description, location or category.
      Parameters:
      keyword - the text to look for
      Returns:
      the matching events (empty if keyword is null or blank)

    • addEventForced

      public void addEventForced(Event e)
      Adds an event without checking for a duplicate title. Used when editing a single occurrence of a recurring series (which produces a one-off event that may share the master's title).
      Parameters:
      e - the event to add

    • removeOccurrence

      public void removeOccurrence(Event master, LocalDate day)
      Removes a single occurrence of a recurring event, keeping the rest of the series.
      Parameters:
      master - the recurring event
      day - the day of the occurrence to drop

    • getAllEvents

      public List<Event> getAllEvents()
      Returns:
      a defensive copy of the event list

    • loadEvents

      public void loadEvents(List<Event> events)
      Replaces the whole event list (used when loading from disk).
      Parameters:
      events - the events to load

    • nextDay

      public LocalDate nextDay(LocalDate date)
      Parameters:
      date - a reference date
      Returns:
      the day after date

    • nextWeek

      public LocalDate nextWeek(LocalDate date)
      Parameters:
      date - a reference date
      Returns:
      the same weekday one week later

    • nextMonth

      public LocalDate nextMonth(LocalDate date)
      Parameters:
      date - a reference date
      Returns:
      the same day one month later

    • nextYear

      public LocalDate nextYear(LocalDate date)
      Parameters:
      date - a reference date
      Returns:
      the same day one year later

    • setViewDate

      public void setViewDate(LocalDate date)
      Sets the date the view should display and notifies observers.
      Parameters:
      date - the new view date

    • setDarkMode

      public void setDarkMode(boolean darkMode)
      Sets the dark-mode flag and notifies observers.
      Parameters:
      darkMode - true for the dark theme

    • setEventSelected

      public void setEventSelected(Event event)
      Sets the currently selected event and notifies observers.
      Parameters:
      event - the selected event (may be null)

    • setViewMode

      public void setViewMode(ViewMode mode)
      Sets the active view mode and notifies observers.
      Parameters:
      mode - the new view mode

    • getCurrentMode

      public ViewMode getCurrentMode()
      Returns:
      the active view mode

    • getCurrentViewDate

      public LocalDate getCurrentViewDate()
      Returns:
      the date currently displayed

    • getEventSelected

      public Event getEventSelected()
      Returns:
      the currently selected event, or null

    • getDarkMode

      public boolean getDarkMode()
      Returns:
      true if the dark theme is active

    • getCurrentDate

      public LocalDate getCurrentDate()
      Returns:
      today's date
